text.title: Opportunity Solution Trees Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: Outcome is a string, not an object with name+value+target; opportunity missing label/score; solution missing assumptions array; kill_list absent.

list.pattern: Solution not attached to an opportunity.
